name: XGolf Alpharetta
about: X-Golf Alpharetta is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a tech-driven experience accessible to all skill levels. The facility utilizes cutting-edge simulators that allow players to world-famous courses without weather concerns, combining high-tech golf with a full bar and food service. Pricing varies by day and time, with hourly rates ranging from $38.50 to $58.50, making it suitable for both serious practice and casual play. The venue is well-suited for individuals, groups, and private events, featuring bays that can be configured for meetings, parties, or golf sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: 98% shot accuracy with detailed ball and club tracking
Immersive 3D graphics and realistic physics for short game
Onsite professional instruction for all skill levels
Full bar and pub-style food available on-site
Versatile bays for both golf and private events

food_and_drink.notes: Pub-style favorites and game-day food available, with a dedicated menu for dining during or after golf sessions.
Full bar offering craft beers, top-shelf spirits, and golf-inspired cocktails.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food or drinks are not mentioned. The venue offers a full bar and pub-style food on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but typical indoor golf sessions last 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as perfect for families, and its laid-back atmosphere suggests it welcomes children.
